---
title: "About"
---

# About

I recently completed an MSc in Medical Genetics at the University of British Columbia. My background combines genomics, statistical analysis, scientific communication, and collaborative research.

## Skills

- R
- Python
- Bash
- SQL
- HTML/CSS
- Genomics data analysis
- Research tool development

## Interests

I am interested in bioinformatics, biostatistics, reproducible workflows, and building tools that make complex analyses easier to interpret and use.
